explanation: This command matches the Sigma rule by invoking PowerShell with the same flags and command structure as the rule detects. It is a direct representation of the malicious behavior described in the rule.
This command uses equivalent syntax by substituting '-c' with '-Command' and reordering the flags. It maintains the same behavior while applying safe mutation techniques.
This command replaces 'gp' (Get-Item) with its full form 'Get-Item' and normalizes the registry path. It preserves the original behavior while applying safe mutation techniques.

This command adds a harmless comment at the end, which does not affect execution but demonstrates safe mutation techniques like insertion.
